summary: End-to-end testing of SII Consulta API + UI completed. 16/16 backend pytest tests passed and all critical frontend flows verified (dashboard tiles, unit query with validation toast, SOAP detail sheet, batch CSV upload, history filters, env-selector persistence in localStorage).
critical_code_review_comments: MOCK clarified: all SOAP calls are mocked. Real WSDL is not invoked (this is expected per the problem statement).

Minor: History page filter `Correcta` works but the click `text=Correcta` may also match badges in the table; using exact dropdown role selector would be more robust. Not a bug, just a test-robustness note.
Minor: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown'); consider FastAPI lifespan handler. Non-blocking.
Minor: consulta-batch endpoint accepts any UTF-8 BOM/latin-1 and detects delimiter heuristically; works for the supplied separators.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple consultas during automated testing (unitarias + 2 batches via API + 1 batch via UI). All persisted in MongoDB collection `consultas`.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend exposes /api/sii/* endpoints. Mock is deterministic via sha256(nif_emisor|num_serie|fecha). Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_sii_api.py covers root, unitary OK/422, determinism, batch (; and ,), batch bad-headers / non-csv, list+filter+pagination, get-by-id 200/404, stats, csv-template, batch export 200/404. Frontend env persists in localStorage('sii_entorno').
